days.title: Chronal Calibration
days.essence: Sum a list of signed frequency changes; part 2 cycles the list repeatedly and uses a seen-set to find the first frequency reached twice.

days.title: Inventory Management System
days.essence: Part 1 counts box IDs with exactly-two and exactly-three repeated letters; part 2 finds the pair of IDs differing in a single position and returns their common letters.

days.title: No Matter How You Slice It
days.essence: Stamp overlapping rectangular fabric claims onto a 2D grid, count multiply-claimed cells, then find the one claim whose cells never overlap any other.

days.title: Repose Record
days.essence: Chronologically sort timestamped guard log entries, attribute sleep minutes per guard, then find the sleepiest guard and the single most-slept minute. The real work is parsing/sorting and per-minute bookkeeping.

days.title: Alchemical Reduction
days.essence: Collapse adjacent same-letter/opposite-case unit pairs with a stack; part 2 removes each unit type entirely and re-reacts to find the shortest result.

days.title: Chronal Coordinates
days.essence: Build a Manhattan-distance Voronoi diagram on a grid; part 1 finds the largest finite cell (discarding regions touching the edge as infinite), part 2 counts cells whose summed distance to all points is under a threshold.

days.title: The Sum of Its Parts
days.essence: Topologically order steps with alphabetical tie-breaking; part 2 raises the stakes by simulating multiple workers with per-step durations to compute total completion time.

days.title: Memory Maneuver
days.essence: Recursive-descent parse a flat number stream into a tree using child/metadata counts; part 1 sums all metadata, part 2 evaluates node values via metadata-as-child-indices.

days.title: Marble Mania
days.essence: Simulate a marble-placement game with the every-23rd-marble scoring rule; part 2 multiplies the marble count by 100, forcing a circular doubly-linked list so insert/remove stay O(1).

days.title: The Stars Align
days.essence: Move points with constant velocities until the bounding box is smallest, at which moment they spell letters; the insight is using minimal area as the convergence signal and reading off the time.

days.title: Chronal Charge
days.essence: Find the highest-power square on a 300x300 power grid; part 2 allows any square size, which explodes naively, so a summed-area (integral image) table makes every window sum O(1).

days.title: Subterranean Sustainability
days.essence: Evolve a 1D Game-of-Life on an unbounded plant row from 5-cell rules; part 2's 50-billion generations are made tractable by detecting the repeating pattern and extrapolating its linear index drift.

days.title: Mine Cart Madness
days.essence: Simulate carts on a track with curve/intersection turning rules and reading-order tick processing; part 1 reports the first crash, part 2 removes crashed carts until one survives. The difficulty is fiddly movement and collision bookkeeping.

days.title: Chocolate Charts
days.essence: Grow a recipe-score sequence by summing two elves' current recipes and advancing them; part 1 reads ten scores after an offset, part 2 streams the sequence to find when the input first appears as a substring.

days.title: Beverage Bandits
days.essence: Notoriously brutal turn-based combat: each unit BFS-moves toward the nearest enemy with strict reading-order tie-breaking, then attacks the weakest adjacent foe. Part 2 binary-/linearly-searches the elf attack power at which no elf dies. The difficulty is the exacting tie-break rules.

days.title: Chronal Classification
days.essence: Implement the 16 wrist-device opcodes; part 1 counts samples consistent with three or more opcodes, part 2 deduces the numeric-to-opcode mapping by constraint elimination and runs the test program.

days.title: Reservoir Research
days.essence: Simulate water flowing down from a spring through clay basins, settling where contained and spilling where it overflows, via recursive flood-fill; part 1 counts all reached tiles, part 2 only the settled water.

days.title: Settlers of The North Pole
days.essence: Run a 2D Game-of-Life on open/tree/lumberyard cells for 10 minutes (part 1); part 2's one billion minutes is solved by detecting the repeating state cycle and indexing into it.

days.title: Go With The Flow
days.essence: Run the opcode device with the instruction pointer bound to a register; part 1 just executes it, but part 2's large register-0 seed never finishes, forcing you to disassemble the program and recognize it as computing the sum of divisors.

days.title: A Regular Map
days.essence: Parse a branching N/S/E/W regex (with nested parentheses/alternation) into a map of rooms and doors via a stack, then BFS the graph; part 1 finds the most-distant room, part 2 counts rooms at least 1000 doors away.

days.title: Chronal Conversion
days.essence: Disassemble the device program to find the single comparison that can halt it; part 1 wants the register-0 value that halts soonest, part 2 the last distinct comparison value before the generator cycles, found by tracking seen states.

days.title: Mode Maze
days.essence: Generate cave region types from an erosion-level recurrence (part 1 sums the risk); part 2 is a Dijkstra/A* over (position, equipped-tool) states where switching tools costs extra time.

days.title: Experimental Emergency Teleportation
days.essence: Part 1 counts nanobots within the strongest bot's Manhattan radius; part 2 is the infamously hard search for the point in range of the most bots (and closest to origin), typically via octree subdivision / branch-and-bound or a z3 solver over 3D Manhattan balls.

days.title: Immune System Simulator 20XX
days.essence: Simulate two armies fighting with effective-power target selection, weaknesses/immunities, and damage ordering; part 2 binary-searches the smallest immune-system boost that wins without stalling. The challenge is the dense rule set and parsing the unit descriptions.

days.title: Four-Dimensional Adventure
days.essence: Count constellations among 4D points: union-find / connected components where two points join when their Manhattan distance is at most 3. A gentle finale once you reach for union-find.
